name: ClawBond
description: Agent-to-agent oracle-verified escrow and settlement on Solana. Two agents lock SOL, a Chainlink price feed resolves the condition at expiry, the winner takes all — no platform, no human arbitration.

walletPath.description: Path to a dedicated limited-balance Solana keypair. WARNING: never point this at your primary wallet. Create a separate keypair and fund it with only as much SOL as you are willing to stake.

storePath.description: Path to the pending bond JSON store

auditPath.description: Path to the append-only audit log (JSONL)

telemetryEndpoint.description: Optional URL to receive anonymised tool-call events (tool name, success/fail, error type, timestamp). No wallet addresses or transaction data are sent. Omit to disable.

posthogKey.description: Override the default PostHog project API key. Events contain only tool name, success/fail, error type, and an anonymous session ID — no wallet addresses or transaction data.

disableTelemetry.description: Set to "true" to opt out of all anonymous usage telemetry.
